Name: Execute xUnit Tests
Description: Run xUnit tests with dotnet and vstest and some filters.

Parameters.Name: PackageDirectoryPath
Parameters.Label: Package directory path
Parameters.HelpText: Path to directory with test package

Parameters.Name: TestPackages
Parameters.Label: Test package(s)
Parameters.HelpText:
Provide test file(s) here. Accepted .dll or .exe.
Separate multiple test file names by spaces.

Parameters.Name: TestCaseFilter
Parameters.Label: Test case filter
Parameters.HelpText:
Only tests that match the given expression will be executed. 
Separate filter conditions with pipe.

Parameters.Name: XUnitAdditionalParameters
Parameters.Label: xUnit Additional Parameters
Parameters.HelpText: Pass any additional parameters you like here, they will be added to dotNet vstest command
